LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTED MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR DEFENDANT TRINITY WEST PARTNERS, INC. ON CONDITION THAT COUNSEL HANDLE THE JANUAARY 27, 2011 DISCOVERY MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: ARLENE HOWELL, CSR # 2542 (301/PJB)

DISCOVERY 301, PLAINTIFF JAMES O'DONOVAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL TRINITY'S FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL PRODUCE ALL DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO REQUESTS 5, 16, 25, 32, 49, 75 AND 77 WITHIN 10 DAYS, EXCEPT THOSE DOCUMENTS ALREADY PRODUCED AT MR. BRUSO'S DEPOSITION. THE COURT AWARDED NO SANCTIONS. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion To Compel Trinity'S Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jan-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF JAMES O'DONOVAN'S Motion To Compel Trinity's Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents is Granted. Defendant shall produce all documents responsive to requests 5, 16, 25, 32, 49, 75 and 77 within 10 days, except those documents already produced at Mr. Bruso's deposition. The court awarded no Sanctions. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)
